blended.narrative: Spirit Mountain is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 4,315 ft. Looking ahead, 15 inches possible over the next 14 days.

Sunday: 6" of snow, highs of 22°F. Expect powder.
